text.title: Churn Save Email Pack Indie Worked Example
text.summary: End-to-end worked example showing inputs → procedure → output for a typical instance of Churn Save Email Pack Indie.

example.scenario: Operator applies Churn Save Email Pack Indie per the procedure and emits a conformant artefact.
example.trace: preconditions=true → procedure applied → artefact emitted → validate-script passes
